description_long: This is a modern, mid-sized SUV with a vibrant red exterior and black trim accents. The vehicle features a prominent front grille with a mesh pattern, sleek LED headlights, and a sculpted hood. The roof is equipped with black rails and a sunroof, while the side profile reveals four passenger doors and silver alloy wheels. The rear of the SUV includes a wide rear window, integrated tail lights, and a subtle roof spoiler. The windows are tinted, and the side mirrors are black, complementing the overall sporty and urban design. The interior, though not visible, is likely composed of fabric, plastic, and metal components typical of contemporary SUVs.
description: A red, modern SUV with black trim, roof rails, and silver alloy wheels, featuring a bold grille and sleek headlights.
description_view_0: Front view showing the bold grille, LED headlights, and sculpted hood.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting four doors, roof rails, and silver alloy wheels.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the wide rear window, tail lights, and roof spoiler.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing doors, wheels, and black trim.
